items.description: Handlers for nginx reload, fail2ban restart, ssh restart, sysctl reload
items.notes: Created handlers for: Reload nginx, Restart nginx, Restart fail2ban, Restart ssh, Reload sysctl.

items.description: Default variables for the role (sites list, security flags, SSL params)
items.notes: Duplicate entry for defaults/main.yml — already written and marked complete via attributes task.

items.description: Main tasks entry point — includes security, nginx, ssl, sites task files in order
items.notes: Duplicate entry for tasks/main.yml — already written and marked complete via recipes/default.rb task.

items.description: Role metadata (no external cookbook dependencies)
items.notes: Fixed yaml[indentation] errors: platforms list items indented 4 spaces, versions list items indented 6 spaces. ansible-lint autofix applied.

items.description: Chef attributes → Ansible defaults/vars (sites list, security.ssh.disable_root, security.ssh.password_auth, SSL subject fields)
items.notes: Converted attributes/default.rb: nginx_sites dict with 3 sites, ssl paths, security flags for fail2ban/ufw/ssh.

items.description: Entry point recipe — includes security, nginx, ssl, sites tasks in order
items.notes: Created missing validate_credentials.yml (referenced by main.yml include_tasks). File asserts nginx_sites, nginx_ssl_certificate_path, nginx_ssl_private_key_path are defined. Resolved load-failure error.

items.description: SSL setup: openssl/ca-certificates install, ssl-cert group, cert/key directories, self-signed cert generation (ansible.builtin.command with creates:) for all 3 sites
items.notes: Fixed yaml[indentation] error at line 4: package name list items now indented 6 spaces. Shell command with loop, creates, when, changed_when, notify all preserved.

items.description: nginx install, global config, security snippet, service enable/start, document root dirs and static index.html files for all 3 sites
items.notes: Converted nginx.rb: installs nginx, deploys nginx.conf and security.conf templates, enables/starts service, creates document roots, copies site index.html files.

items.description: Security hardening: fail2ban, ufw firewall rules, sysctl kernel params, SSH hardening (lineinfile for PermitRootLogin/PasswordAuthentication)
items.notes: Fixed yaml[indentation] error at line 4: package name list items now indented 6 spaces (2 more than name: key). All UFW commands, changed_when, failed_when, lineinfile tasks preserved.

items.description: Virtual host configs: render site.conf.j2 for all 3 sites, create sites-enabled symlinks, remove default site
items.notes: Converted sites.rb: deploys site.conf templates with task-level vars per site, creates symlinks in sites-enabled, removes default site.

items.description: fail2ban jail configuration: DEFAULT section + sshd, nginx-http-auth, nginx-limit-req, nginx-botsearch jails
items.notes: Converted ERB template to Jinja2. Includes DEFAULT, sshd, nginx-http-auth, nginx-limit-req, and nginx-botsearch jail configurations.

items.description: nginx security snippet: server_tokens, rate-limit zones, buffer sizes, timeouts, SSL session/protocol globals
items.notes: Converted ERB template to Jinja2. Nginx security hardening: server_tokens off, rate limiting, buffer limits, SSL settings.

items.description: Kernel hardening sysctl parameters: rp_filter, redirect suppression, martian logging, ICMP, IPv6 disable, TCP SYN cookie protection
items.notes: Converted ERB template to Jinja2. Kernel security parameters: IP spoofing protection, ICMP redirect blocking, SYN flood protection, IPv6 disable.

items.description: Global nginx configuration (user, worker_processes, worker_connections, gzip, logging, includes)
items.notes: Converted ERB template to Jinja2. Standard nginx.conf with events, http, gzip, and virtual host includes.

items.description: Per-site virtual host config: HTTP→HTTPS redirect block + HTTPS block with SSL, HSTS, security headers, gzip, per-site logs (rendered 3 times)
items.notes: Converted ERB template to Jinja2. Uses task-level vars: server_name, document_root, ssl_enabled, cert_file, key_file. HTTP→HTTPS redirect, security headers, gzip.

items.description: Static HTML landing page for ci.cluster.local — deployed to /opt/server/ci/index.html (owner www-data:www-data, mode 0644)
items.notes: Copied verbatim from Chef cookbook files/default/ci/index.html.

items.description: Static HTML landing page for status.cluster.local — deployed to /opt/server/status/index.html (owner www-data:www-data, mode 0644)
items.notes: Copied verbatim from Chef cookbook files/default/status/index.html.

items.description: Static HTML landing page for test.cluster.local — deployed to /opt/server/test/index.html (owner www-data:www-data, mode 0644)
items.notes: Copied verbatim from Chef cookbook files/default/test/index.html.

items.description: No-op instance create playbook for delegated driver

items.description: Converge playbook — creates expected filesystem state under /tmp/molecule_test/ (nginx configs, site dirs, SSL dirs, fail2ban, sysctl paths)
items.notes: Written: builds full /tmp/molecule_test/ tree — directories, nginx.conf, security.conf, 3x site configs, symlinks, index.html files, SSL cert/key placeholders (mode 0640), fail2ban jail.local, sysctl 99-security.conf, sshd_config, per-site log files. No become, no include_role.

items.description: No-op instance destroy playbook for delegated driver
items.notes: Created by MoleculeAgent (deterministic scaffold)

items.description: Verify playbook — checks /tmp/molecule_test/ paths for nginx configs, site configs, symlinks, static files, SSL dirs, fail2ban jail, sysctl conf
items.notes: Written: 15 sections — service status (notest), port checks (notest), nginx.conf directives, security.conf hardening, 3x site configs + symlink targets, default site absent, 3x docroots + index.html content, SSL certs/keys existence + mode 0640, SSL dir permissions (0755/0710), fail2ban jail sections, sysctl params, sshd_config hardening, per-site log files, HTTP 301 + HTTPS 200 checks (notest).

items.description: Created standard meta/main.yml
